title: Explorer Package
subtitle: A whirlwind tour of Eastern Uganda's highlights, from the source of the Nile to the stunning Sipi Falls.
description: The Explorer Package is the perfect introduction to the beauty and adventure of Eastern Uganda. This compact journey takes you to the legendary Source of the Nile in Jinja, where you'll experience the power of the world's longest river. Then, you'll travel to the stunning Sipi Falls on the slopes of Mt. Elgon for breathtaking hikes and a unique coffee tour. It's an ideal trip for those with limited time who want to experience some of Uganda's most iconic landscapes.

sampleItinerary.activity: Arrival in Jinja & Source of the Nile
sampleItinerary.description: Travel to Jinja, visit the Source of the Nile with a boat tour, and explore Jinja town. Overnight in Jinja.
Morning drive to Sipi Falls. Check into your lodge with stunning waterfall views and relax.
Embark on a guided hike to all three Sipi waterfalls. In the afternoon, experience a farm-to-cup coffee tour with local farmers.
Enjoy a final breakfast with waterfall views before departing for Kampala/Entebbe.

title: Adventurer Package
subtitle: The ultimate primate experience, combining world-famous gorilla trekking with chimpanzee tracking in Kibale.
description: The Adventurer Package is a primate lover's dream. This tour focuses on Uganda's two most iconic primate experiences. You'll begin in Kibale Forest, the primate capital of the world, to track habituated chimpanzees. Afterwards, you'll journey south to the ancient Bwindi Impenetrable Forest for the awe-inspiring experience of spending time with a mountain gorilla family. This is a profound wildlife journey you'll never forget.

sampleItinerary.description: Depart from Kampala/Entebbe and travel to the region of Kibale Forest National Park. Check into your lodge near the forest.
Morning chimpanzee trek in Kibale Forest. In the afternoon, take a guided walk through the Bigodi Wetland Sanctuary.
Journey south towards Bwindi Impenetrable National Park, enjoying scenic views of the 'Mountains of the Moon' en route.
The highlight of your trip! A full day dedicated to trekking and observing a mountain gorilla family in their natural habitat.
A day to relax after the trek, or opt for a guided community walk to learn about the local Bakiga and Batwa cultures.
Break the journey back to Kampala with a stop at Lake Mburo National Park, known for its zebras and cycling safaris.
Enjoy a morning walking safari in Lake Mburo before continuing your journey back to Kampala/Entebbe.

title: Ultimate Safari
subtitle: A grand tour of Uganda's premier western parks, featuring savannah, forests, and incredible wildlife.
description: The Ultimate Safari is a comprehensive journey through the highlights of Western Uganda. Starting with the powerful Murchison Falls, you'll experience classic savannah game drives and a Nile boat safari. You'll then head to Kibale for chimpanzee trekking before exploring the diverse ecosystems of Queen Elizabeth National Park, famous for its tree-climbing lions and the Kazinga Channel. This tour offers an unparalleled diversity of landscapes and wildlife.

sampleItinerary.description: Drive north from Kampala, stopping at the Ziwa Rhino Sanctuary en route. Continue to your lodge near Murchison Falls.
Morning game drive on the northern bank. In the afternoon, take a boat safari on the Nile to the base of the falls.

sampleItinerary.activity: Top of the Falls & Travel to Kibale
sampleItinerary.description: Visit the top of Murchison Falls, then begin the scenic drive south towards the Kibale Forest region.
Track chimpanzees in Kibale Forest National Park, followed by an afternoon walk in the Bigodi Wetlands.
Short drive to Queen Elizabeth National Park, with an evening game drive upon arrival.
Morning game drive in the Kasenyi plains. In the afternoon, enjoy a boat cruise along the famous Kazinga Channel.
Drive to the southern Ishasha sector of the park to search for the famous tree-climbing lions.
Travel to the stunningly beautiful Lake Bunyonyi for an afternoon of relaxation, canoeing or swimming.
Full day to explore the 'Lake of Little Birds' by canoe, visit various islands, or simply relax by the shore.
Enjoy a final scenic breakfast before your journey back to Kampala/Entebbe, with a stop at the Equator.

title: Super Combo & Safari
subtitle: The definitive Ugandan safari, combining all major highlights from savannahs to primates.
description: For the traveler who wants to see it all, the Super Combi is our most comprehensive package. This epic 14-day journey covers the best of Uganda: the powerful Murchison Falls, chimpanzee trekking in Kibale, the diverse wildlife of Queen Elizabeth National Park, and the unforgettable mountain gorilla encounter in Bwindi Impenetrable Forest. This is the ultimate Ugandan wildlife and landscape experience.

sampleItinerary.description: Arrive and drive to Murchison Falls NP, stopping at Ziwa Rhino Sanctuary.
Morning game drive and afternoon Nile boat safari to the base of the falls.
Visit the top of the falls, then a long scenic drive to the Kibale region.
Track chimpanzees in Kibale and explore Bigodi Wetland Sanctuary in the afternoon.
Drive to Queen Elizabeth National Park, crossing the equator. Evening game drive.
Morning game drive and afternoon boat cruise on the Kazinga Channel.
Head to the southern Ishasha sector to find the famous tree-climbing lions.
Morning game drive in Ishasha before transferring to Bwindi Impenetrable Forest.
The ultimate wildlife experience: spend an hour with a mountain gorilla family.
Rest day. Optional activities include a community walk or a visit to Lake Mutanda.
Break the long journey with a stop at Lake Mburo National Park.
Experience a unique walking safari among zebras and impalas. Afternoon boat trip.
Enjoy an optional cycling safari before heading to your hotel in Entebbe.
Depending on your flight schedule, visit the botanical gardens or wildlife center before your departure.
